rationale: Tests if sudden DXY rate-of-change reversals lead global liquidity allocations into US mega-cap tech.
expected_failure_mode: Domestic growth factors or tech-specific themes can override global currency trends.
stop_conditions: drift is not reproducible from point-in-time snapshots
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Information coefficient between weekly DXY changes and NDX returns falls below 0.05.
Drawdown is 1.2x larger than buy-and-hold during a currency crisis.
